basic_details.job_title: Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of Akashvani Leh. Has been announced through the RNU Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 50 years who have completed Graduation from a recognized University along with proficiency in Ladakhi Language and good quality voice suited for broadcasting are eligible to apply for these News Reader Cum Translator vacancies. The offline application process for RNU Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 has started on 05 May 2026 and will

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Proficiency in Ladakhi Language, Good quality voice suited for broadcasting
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University Proficiency in Ladakhi Language Good quality voice suited for broadcasting

salary_details.details: ₹1875/- per full shift for freshers ₹2400/- per full shift for candidates with three or more years of experience

selection_process: Written Test for General Knowledge and Current Affairs as well as knowledge of Ladakhi Language Voice Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Akashvani Leh News Reader Cum Translator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Akashvani Leh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the News Reader Cum Translator (Ladakhi) post is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the News Reader Cum Translator (Ladakhi) post is between 21 years and 50 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines, so refer to the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the News Reader Cum Translator (Ladakhi) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university and possess proficiency in the Ladakhi language. A good quality voice suitable for broadcasting is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the News Reader Cum Translator (Ladakhi) position?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test covering general knowledge, current affairs, and Ladakhi language, followed by a voice test and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this contractual position?
faq.answer: The salary for freshers is ₹1875/- per full shift, while candidates with three or more years of experience will receive ₹2400/- per full shift.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Akashvani Leh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 354/- (including GST), and SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 265.50/- (including GST).

faq.question: Q7. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates. Refer to the official notification for a complete list.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Ladakh apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies proficiency in Ladakhi Language as a requirement, suggesting a preference for candidates familiar with the local language. However, eligibility details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Akashvani Leh. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
